title: Improve Board Description
excerpt:
The possibility to format the board description and that anybody can edit it without depending on permissions stablished on the board. 
Besides, if the board description is long, it does not auto adapt to the space so so…

posts.author: AGJ (Ana)
posts.cookedHtml:
The possibility to format the board description and that anybody can edit it without depending on permissions stablished on the board.
Besides, if the board description is long, it does not auto adapt to the space so some users can not see the whole description. This would have to be fixed.
